license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.rted6je
title: steady-state ATP levels, and NAD+/NADH
author: Wen Aw

steps_raw.instruction: ATP and NAD + and NADH metabolites were extracted from female third instar wandering larvae harbouring Alstonville and Dahomey mtDNA raised on 1:2 P:C and 1:16 P:C diets (7 replicates per mitotype-diet combination)
The extracted metabolites were analysed using liquid chromatography (LC) electrospray ionisation tandem mass spectrometry (ESI-MS/MS)
ATP levels were determined by quantifying the area under the curve.
The NAD + /NADH ratio was calculated as relative differences in peak areas between NAD + and NADH metabolites.
